name: @ledgerline/types
description: Shared contracts — domain entities, money, and Kafka event schemas. Imported by every service and app via workspace:*.
//: Consumed AS SOURCE: money-tracker uses Next transpilePackages, and tsc/Vite read the .ts directly. Pointing main/types/exports at src means NO build step is needed to resolve this package — a fresh CI checkout (no dist/) type-checks and builds. The `build` script still emits dist/ for anyone who wants the compiled artifact.
